content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the dashed center line bending leftward, and the car appears well-positioned near center with good visibility of the track.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 58, target index = (58+5) % 121 = 63
- Target WP63: x=3.6882, y=3.8667
- Car: x=4.3412, y=3.3082, heading=130.31°
- dy = 3.8667 - 3.3082 = 0.5585, dx = 3.6882 - 4.3412 = -0.6530
- bearing = atan2(0.5585, -0.6530) → second quadrant: atan(0.5585/0.6530) = 40.5°, bearing = 180° - 40.5° = **139.5°**
- delta = 139.5 - 130.31 = **+9.19°** → slight left

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.3808m, distance_from_center = 0.1538m
- is_left_of_center = false (right of center), edge_distance = 0.3808 - 0.1538 = 0.2270m → clear
- No boundary override

Delta ~+9.19° → |delta| 5-15°, use steering_angle=+5, speed=1.5.

```json

  "reasoning": "Track curves gently left ahead, delta=+9.19° to WP63 indicates continued slight left correction needed; car is 0.15m right of center with good clearance, maintaining small positive steering at full speed.",

    "Track starts with long straight along y≈0.683 before curving left around x=6.3-7.3.",

    "Car consistently near center (~0.14-0.15m right of center) — no boundary concern.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves; reduce to 1.0 only when delta >30°.",
    "Track total length ~17.7m, 121 waypoints.",
    "Use minimal steering on near-straight sections to avoid oscillation.",
    "Southward bend WP55-70 is gentle; small positive steering (+5°) sufficient to track curve.",
    "Delta stable around +7° to +9° in this section — +5° steering is appropriate."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [4.5302, 4.4655, 4.4060, 4.3412],
    "y": [3.0491, 3.1349, 3.2172, 3.3082],

  },

  "steering_angle": 5.0
}
```
